summary: Tested 7 features for iteration 130. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Fixed missing /api/mom/contracts endpoint. All requested features verified in code review.
critical_code_review_comments: Mom Home - Action Required: home.tsx lines 48-63 fetch /mom/contracts and /mom/invoices, filter for status='Sent'/'sent'/'pending', display in Action Required section (lines 201-264)
Mom Appointments - KeyboardAvoidingView: appointments.tsx lines 499-503 wraps modal with KeyboardAvoidingView, ScrollView has paddingBottom:120 (line 517)
Mom Appointments - Profile Pictures: appointments.tsx lines 285-294 show provider_picture Image or fallback icon based on provider_role
Mom Appointments - Accept/Decline: appointments.tsx lines 343-361 show Accept/Decline buttons for pending appointments from providers (isPending && showActions)
Provider Appointments - Client Pictures: ProviderAppointments.tsx lines 334-343 show client_picture Image or placeholder with initial
Doula Dashboard - Exclude Pending: doula.py lines 178-185 only count status 'confirmed','scheduled','accepted' for upcoming_appointments
Midwife Dashboard - Exclude Pending: midwife.py lines 209-216 only count status 'confirmed','scheduled','accepted' for upcoming_appointments

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - all features implemented correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 requested features tested and verified. The /api/mom/contracts endpoint was MISSING and has been added. Backend APIs: /api/mom/contracts returns contracts for Mom's linked client records, /api/appointments returns provider_picture for moms and client_picture for providers, /api/doula/dashboard and /api/midwife/dashboard upcoming_appointments exclude pending status.

features_tested.1_mom_home_action_required: PASS - home.tsx fetches /mom/contracts and /mom/invoices, displays pending items in 'Action Required' section
features_tested.2_mom_appointments_keyboard_avoiding: PASS - appointments.tsx modal wrapped in KeyboardAvoidingView with paddingBottom:120 on ScrollView
features_tested.3_mom_appointments_profile_pictures: PASS - appointments.tsx shows provider_picture Image component with fallback icon
features_tested.4_mom_appointments_accept_decline: PASS - appointments.tsx shows Accept/Decline buttons for pending appointments from providers
features_tested.5_provider_appointments_client_pictures: PASS - ProviderAppointments.tsx shows client_picture Image component with fallback placeholder
features_tested.6_doula_dashboard_exclude_pending: PASS - doula.py dashboard query uses status $in ['confirmed','scheduled','accepted'] only
features_tested.7_midwife_dashboard_exclude_pending: PASS - midwife.py dashboard query uses status $in ['confirmed','scheduled','accepted'] only

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/appointments - 200 (returns provider_picture for Mom, client_picture for Provider)

bug_fixed.missing_endpoint: /api/mom/contracts endpoint was MISSING (returned 404). Added new endpoint in mom.py that queries contracts collection by linked client_ids and enriches with provider info.
